# cycloid_plugin_registry_plugin (Data Source)

Look up a plugin definition within a registry by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The display name of the plugin to look up.
- `registry_id` (Number) The ID of the plugin registry to search within.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) The organization canonical, defaults to the provider `default_organization`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the plugin.
- `owned` (Boolean) Whether this plugin is owned by the organization.
